text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I bet Narita Brian's got this in the bag. But then
again, Hishi Amazon did a pretty good job at the
Shuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
You're forgetting how amazing Brian was at the
Kikuka Sho! She's practically a beast!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Who knows? Imagine if one of the other racers
slipped past them both! Man, this Arima Kinen
will be one to remember!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone is filled to the brim with excitement for
the race that's about to unfold.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Yeeeaaah! Man, I'm totally pumped up!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'll keep things short. We've finally made it here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At long last, the curtain rises on the Arima Kinen!
